name: hs_deal_name
label: Deal Name
description: The title of the deal associated with this quote.

name: hs_acceptance_method
label: Acceptance method
description: The acceptance method of the quote

name: hs_accepted_date
label: Accepted date
description: The date and time the quote was accepted

name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
label: All teams
description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
label: Business units
description: The business units this record is assigned to.

name: hs_all_associated_deal_owner_ids
label: All Associated Deal Owner IDs
description: All owner Ids of the associated deal.

name: hs_all_owner_ids
label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_allowed_checkout_fee_ids
label: Allowed checkout fee IDs
description: Stores up to two ids for the checkout fees that can be applied to the quote at checkout

name: hs_allowed_payment_methods
label: Allowed Payment Methods
description: Accepted forms of payment if quote is using HubSpot Payment

name: hs_approval_request_note
label: Approval request note
description: Note for approvers from the requestor with additional information about the quote

name: hs_approver_id
label: Quote Approver
description: The approver for this quote. This is a legacy quote property.

name: hs_archived
label: Is Archived
description: Indicates if this quote is archived or not

name: hs_associated_deal_owner_id
label: Associated Deal Owner ID
description: The owner Id of the associated deal.

name: hs_bill_to_details_editability
label: Bill To details editability
description: Bill To details editability

name: hs_billing_enabled
label: Billing enabled
description: Enable billing to automatically create invoices and subscriptions.

name: hs_billing_invoice_checkout
label: Billing invoice checkout
description: Indicates that this quote uses billing invoice checkout instead of quote-level checkout for payments.

name: hs_buyer_billing_address
label: Buyer billing address
description: The street address used to bill quote buyer

name: hs_buyer_billing_address2
label: Buyer billing street address 2
description: The second line street address used to bill quote buyer

name: hs_buyer_billing_city
label: Buyer billing city
description: The city name used to billquote buyer

name: hs_buyer_billing_country
label: Buyer billing country
description: The buyer's billing country.

name: hs_buyer_billing_country_code
label: Buyer billing country code
description: The country code used to bill quote buyer

name: hs_buyer_billing_state
label: Buyer billing state/region
description: The state/region used to bill quote buyer

name: hs_buyer_billing_state_code
label: Buyer billing state/region code
description: The state/region code used to bill quote buyer

name: hs_buyer_billing_zip
label: Buyer billing postal code
description: The postal code used to bill quote buyer

name: hs_buyer_tax_id
label: Buyer Tax ID
description: Tax types and IDs for a buyer company

name: hs_buyer_tax_id_editability
label: Buyer Tax ID editability
description: Buyer Tax ID editability

name: hs_change_effective_date
label: Change effective date
description: The date the change quote goes into effect

name: hs_change_prorating
label: Change Prorating
description: Enable proration to adjust charges based on the change effective date

name: hs_clickwrap_accepted_by
label: Accepted By (Clickwrap)
description: The name or identifier of the individual who accepted the quote via clickwrap (i.e., without providing a handwritten or electronic signature).

name: hs_closing_agent_enabled
label: Closing agent enabled
description: Boolean property which determines whether the buyer-facing agent will be rendered on the public quote

name: hs_collect_billing_address
label: Collect Billing Address
description: Indicates if billing address should be collected with this quote

name: hs_collect_shipping_address
label: Collect shipping address
description: Indicates if shipping address should be collected with this quote

name: hs_collection_process
label: Payment collection process
description: How payments on this quote are collected from the buyer.

name: hs_comments
label: Comments to buyer
description: Comments to the buyer. This property is not filled for CPQ_QUOTE template types

name: hs_content_id
label: Content id
description: Content id associated with the quote

name: hs_contract_effective_start_date
label: Contract effective start date
description: Contract effective start date.

name: hs_contract_effective_start_date_type
label: Contract effective start date type
description: Specifies how the effective start date of a contract is determined.

name: hs_contract_effective_start_delayed_by_days
label: Contract effective start delayed by days
description: The number of days contract's effective start date is delayed by.

name: hs_contract_effective_start_delayed_by_months
label: Contract effective start delayed by months
description: The number of months contract's effective start date is delayed by.

name: hs_cover_letter
label: Cover Letter
description: The cover letter presented on this quote.

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Create date
description: The date the quote was created

name: hs_currency
label: Currency
description: Currency code for the quote

name: hs_dealless_quote
label: Is Dealless quote
description: Signifies whether a quote is dealless quote or not.

name: hs_display_tcv_on_quote
label: Display TCV on Quote
description: Indicates if total contract value (TCV) should be displayed on the published quote

name: hs_domain
label: Quote Domain
description: Domain this quote should be served from

name: hs_enabled_automated_taxes
label: Automated taxes enabled
description: Whether or not automated tax is enabled for the quote

name: hs_esign_date
label: ESign Date
description: The date and time the quote was signed by all signers. This includes countersigners. This will be empty or 0 if the quote has not been fully signed.

name: hs_esign_enabled
label: ESign enabled
description: Indicates if esign is enabled for quote

name: hs_esign_num_signers_completed
label: ESign completed signatures
description: Number of completed signatures collected so far

name: hs_esign_num_signers_required
label: ESign number of signers required
description: Total number of signers required for this quote to be fully signed. This includes both contact signers and countersigners.

name: hs_esign_reassignment_enabled
label: ESign Reassignment Enabled
description: Whether the signer is allowed to reassign themselves to a different signer

name: hs_esign_verification_method
label: Esign Verification Method
description: The Verification Method for Esign

name: hs_executive_summary
label: Executive summary
description: An executive summary for the quote is a brief overview that introduces the company and its offering, highlights key benefits and outcomes in relation to the prospect's challenges, builds trust, and demonstrates commitment to service and support.

name: hs_expiration_date
label: Expiration date
description: The date that this quote expires

name: hs_expiration_template_path
label: Expiration Template Path
description: Path of the expiration template for the quote

name: hs_expired
label: Expired
description: Value representing whether this quote is expired

name: hs_expired_end_of_access_date
label: Expired end of access date
description: The timestamp for when an accessible, expired CQT quote will no longer be accessible

name: hs_feedback
label: Quote approval feedback
description: Feedback about this quote during the approval process

name: hs_fees_total
label: Fees total
description: The sum of all fees applied to the quote.

name: hs_first_sent_date
label: first sent date
description: The first time quote was sent to the customer. This is updated automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_language
label: Language
description: The language for displaying this quote publicly

name: hs_last_buyer_interaction_date
label: Last Buyer Interaction Date
description: The date of the last buyer interaction

name: hs_last_published_date
label: Last published date
description: The date and time of the last time this quote was published.

name: hs_last_sent_date
label: Last sent date
description: The last time the quote was sent through the HubSpot quote email sender.

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Last modified date
description: The last time any property on the quote was modified

name: hs_legacy_stripe_migrated
label: Legacy Stripe Migrated
description: Indicates if the processor(aka hs_payment_type) is changed as part of legacy stripe quote migration"

name: hs_line_item_context_id
label: Line Item Context Id
description: Id for the object that holds metadata for the line items associated with this quote

name: hs_line_item_global_term_hs_discount_percentage
label: Global Term Line Item Discount Percentage
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Global term for the discount percentage applied.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_hs_discount_percentage_enabled
label: Global Term Line Item Discount Percentage Enabled
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Indicates if the Global term for the discount percentage is enabled.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_hs_recurring_billing_period
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Period
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Global term for product recurring billing duration.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_hs_recurring_billing_period_enabled
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Period Enabled
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Indicates if the Global term for product recurring billing duration is enabled.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_hs_recurring_billing_start_date
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Start Date
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Global term for recurring billing start date for a line item.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_hs_recurring_billing_start_date_enabled
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Start Date Enabled
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Indicates if the Global term for recurring billing start date for a line item is enabled.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_recurringbillingfrequency
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Frequency
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Global term for how frequently the product is billed.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_recurringbillingfrequency_enabled
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Frequency Enabled
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Indicates if the Global term for how frequently the product is billed is enabled

name: hs_locale
label: Locale
description: The locale for displaying this quote publicly

name: hs_lock_reason
label: Lock reason
description: Hold reason for why this quote is locked

name: hs_locked
label: Locked
description: Indicates if this quote is locked and can never be updated

name: hs_logo_url
label: Logo URL
description: URL to image of the logo displayed on the quote

name: hs_manually_signed
label: Has been manually signed
description: Indicates whether the quote has been marked signed.

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged record IDs
description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_net_payment_terms
label: Net payment terms
description: The period in days in which a buyer must make full payment

name: hs_num_associated_deals
label: Associated Deals
description: The number of deals associated with this quote. This is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_number_of_buyer_billing_contact_changes
label: Number of buyer billing contact changes
description: Number of times the billing contact has been changed by the buyer

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source
label: Record creation source
description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_id
label: Record creation source ID
description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id
label: Record creation source user ID
description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_original_template_path
label: Original template path
description: Content model template path used to create a CPQ quote

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_payment_date
label: Payment date
description: The date and time the quote was paid by the customer. This will be 0 if the payment is processing and empty if the quote is not paid.

name: hs_payment_enabled
label: Payment enabled
description: Indicates if payment can be collected via the quote link

name: hs_payment_status
label: Quote payment status
description: An enumeration representing the current status of payments on a quote. This is purely for information and should not be updated manually. Check the values for more states.

name: hs_payment_type
label: Payment Type
description: Payment type for the quote if payment is enabled

name: hs_pdf_download_link
label: Quote PDF download link
description: The link to download a pdf of a quote

name: hs_pdf_generation_error_reason
label: PDF generation failure error reason
description: Error reason for Quote PDF generation failure

name: hs_pdf_generation_status
label: Status of quote pdf generation
description: Quote PDF generation status

options.label: Pdf for quote failed to generate
Retrying to generate a quote Pdf that has previously failed
Pdf for quote failed to generate, recall quote

name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
label: Pinned engagement ID
description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown in the app if there is already an association to the engagement.

name: hs_primary_color
label: Branding color
description: Color value used on the quote document

name: hs_proposal_domain
label: Proposal Domain
description: Domain this proposal should be served from

name: hs_proposal_slug
label: Proposal Slug
description: Path to serve this proposal from

name: hs_proposal_template_path
label: Proposal Template
description: Template Path this proposal is rendered with

name: hs_public_url_key
label: Public URL key
description: Key for accessing quote document URL

name: hs_purchase_order_editability
label: Purchase Order editability
description: Purchase Order editability

name: hs_purchase_order_number
label: PO number
description: Purchase order number

name: hs_quote_amount
label: Quote amount
description: The total amount due for the quote. This can be either total contract value or the amount due at checkout depending on portal settings

name: hs_quote_amount_in_home_currency
label: Quote Amount in Home Currency
description: The quote amount in the portal's home currency. This will not be updated if the home currency is changed

name: hs_quote_auth_method
label: Quote authentication method
description: Buyer authentication setting for shared quote links

name: hs_quote_auth_password
label: Quote authentication password
description: The password to access the quote for a password authentication method.

name: hs_quote_esign_status
label: Signing Status
description: Calculated status for quote e-signature progress based on esign enablement and signature completion

name: hs_quote_link
label: Link to hosted Quote
description: The url hosting the public quote. This will be empty if the quote is not publicly available.

name: hs_quote_number
label: Quote number
description: Reference number shown on quote document

name: hs_quote_owner_id
label: Quote Owner ID
description: The owner of this quote. This will be the associated deal's owner or the quote's creator if there is no associated deal.

name: hs_quote_progression_status
label: Quote progression status
description: A representation of the quote's status throughout its lifetime. This has a hierarchy represented by the order of the property's possible values. Example: If a quote is both Viewed and Paid, then Paid will take priority.

name: hs_quote_status
label: Quote Status
description: Derived quote status for CRM indexing

name: hs_quote_total_preference
label: Quote Total Preference
description: What LineItem property will be used to calculate the Quote Amount

name: hs_quote_version
label: Quote Version
description: The current version of the quote

name: hs_quote_view_count
label: Quote View Count
description: The number of views of the quote

name: hs_read_only
label: Read only object
description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

name: hs_render_status
label: Status of quote rendering
description: The render status of a quote

options.label: Quote has rendered on the specified domain and slug

name: hs_sales_email_last_replied
label: Recent Sales Email Replied Date
description: The last time a tracked sales email was replied to for this quote

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_show_bill_to_details
label: Show bill to details
description: Whether to show the bill to details section on the quote

name: hs_show_countersignature_box
label: Has space for manual countersignature
description: Indicates whether the quote should have a place for a manual countersignature

name: hs_show_signature_box
label: Has space for manual signature
description: Indicates if the quote document should have a place for a written signature

options.label: Quote needs countersign to complete esign process
Quote has been manually signed (via marked as sign feature)

name: hs_slug
label: Quote Slug
description: Path to serve this quote from

name: hs_sold_to_details_editability
label: Sold To details editability
description: Sold To details editability

name: hs_status
label: Internal quote status
description: The current status of the quote.

name: hs_store_payment_method_at_checkout
label: Can store payment method at checkout
description: Whether the option to store payment method is available to a customer at checkout

name: hs_tax_calculation_id
label: Tax calculation ID
description: The reference ID to the tax calculation data for this quote

name: hs_tax_total
label: Tax total
description: Total tax collected for the quote.

name: hs_tcv
label: Total Contract Value
description: The total contract value (TCV) of this quote.

name: hs_template
label: Legacy Quote Template
description: The legacy quote template used to generate a quote. These templates will be sunset on Dec. 12th 2022.

name: hs_template_type
label: Template type
description: The system in which the quote template was created.

name: hs_terms
label: Terms
description: The terms of the quote.

name: hs_test_mode
label: Test mode
description: Indicates if the quote is in test mode

name: hs_timezone
label: Time zone
description: Timezone for displaying dates on the quote

name: hs_title
label: Quote title
description: The title of this quote

name: hs_total_discount
label: Total Discount
description: The aggregate value of all discounts applied to the quote

name: hs_total_discount_percent
label: Total discount percent
description: The total discount applied to the quote, expressed as a percentage of the quote's total contract value.

name: hs_type
label: Type
description: The type of the quote. This is in relation to the contract that the quote is a part of.

name: hs_unique_creation_key
label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
label: User IDs of all owners
description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

name: hs_uses_company_address_for_billing_address
label: Uses company address for billing address
description: Decide whether or not to use company billing address as the buyer billing address

name: hs_was_imported
label: Performed in an import
description: Object is part of an import

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Quote owner
description: The owner of the quote

name: hubspot_team_id
label: HubSpot team
description: The name of the team associated with the owner of the quote

name: notes_last_contacted
label: Last Contacted
description: The last timestamp when a call, email or meeting was logged for this quote

name: notes_last_updated
label: Last Activity Date
description: The last time a note, call, email, meeting, or task was logged for a quote. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the quote record.

name: notes_next_activity_date
label: Next Activity Date
description: The date of the next upcoming activity for this quote

name: num_contacted_notes
label: Number of times contacted
description: The number of times a call, email or meeting was logged for this quote

name: num_notes
label: Number of Sales Activities
description: Number of sales activities for this quote

name: hs_automated_reminders_enabled
label: Automated reminders enabled
description: Whether the quote has automated reminders set up.

name: hs_last_reminder_sent_date
label: Last automated reminder sent date
description: Date on which the last automated reminder was sent.

name: hs_upcoming_reminder_date
label: Upcoming reminder date
description: Upcoming reminder date

name: hs_breeze_edit_count
label: Breeze Edit Count
description: The number of times breeze made an edit to the quote

name: hs_quote_activity_count
label: Quote Activity Count
description: A measurement of the activity on a quote. By default this is the sum of all print, download, and view events

name: hs_quote_activity_count_since_last_communication
label: Quote Activity Count Since Last Communication
description: A measurement of the activity on a quote since the last communication. By default this is the sum of all print, download, and view events

name: hs_quote_download_count
label: Quote Download Count
description: The count of all download activity on a quote

name: hs_quote_download_count_since_last_communication
label: Quote Download Count Since Last Communication
description: The number of downloads a quote has received since the last communication with a customer

name: hs_quote_print_count
label: Quote Print Count
description: The count of all print activity on a quote

name: hs_quote_print_count_since_last_communication
label: Quote Print Count Since Last Communication
description: The number of prints a quote has received since the last communication with a customer

name: hs_quote_view_count_since_last_communication
label: Quote View Count Since Last Communication
description: The number of views a quote has received since the last communication with a customer

name: hs_sender_company_address
label: Sender company street address
description: The street address of the company sending this quote

name: hs_sender_company_address2
label: Sender company street address 2
description: The second line of the street address of the company sending this quote

name: hs_sender_company_city
label: Sender company city
description: The city in which the company sending this quote is located

name: hs_sender_company_country
label: Sender company country
description: The country in which the company sending this quote is located

name: hs_sender_company_domain
label: Sender company domain
description: The domain of the company sending this quote

name: hs_sender_company_image_url
label: Sender company image URL
description: URL to image of the sender company image to be set on the quote

name: hs_sender_company_name
label: Sender company name
description: The name of the company sending this quote

name: hs_sender_company_state
label: Sender company state/region
description: The state/region in which the company sending this quote is located

name: hs_sender_company_zip
label: Sender company postal code
description: The zip code in which the company sending this quote is located

name: hs_sender_email
label: Sender email
description: Email address of the sender of this quote

name: hs_sender_firstname
label: Sender first name
description: First name of the sender of this quote

name: hs_sender_image_url
label: Sender image URL
description: URL to image of the sender avatar image to be set on the quote

name: hs_sender_jobtitle
label: Sender job title
description: Job title of the sender of this quote

name: hs_sender_lastname
label: Sender last name
description: Last name of the sender of this quote

name: hs_sender_phone
label: Sender phone number
description: Phone number of the sender of this quote
